questions.statement:
What is <span class="math-tex">\(\rm \lim_{x\rightarrow \frac{\pi}{2}}(\sec \theta-\tan \theta)\)</span> equal to? 
दिया गया है \(\rm \lim_{x\rightarrow \frac{\pi}{2}}(\sec \theta-\tan \theta)\) किसके बराबर है?

If f(x), defined <span class="math-tex">\(f(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{lll} k x+1 & \text { if } & x \leq \pi \\ \cos x & \text { if } & x>\pi \end{array}\right.\)</span> is continuous at x = π, then the value of k is : 
यदि f(x), <span class="math-tex">\(f(x)=\left\{\begin{array}{lll} k x+1 & \text { if } & x \leq \pi \\ \cos x & \text { if } & x>\pi \end{array}\right.\)</span> द्वारा परिभाषित है, x = π पर संतत है, तो k का मान है:
